name: Android CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main", "master" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main", "master" ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Android APK
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download Clean Gradle Wrapper JAR
        run: |
          curl -sLo gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradle/gradle/v9.3.1/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar

      - name: Validate Gradle Wrapper
        uses: gradle/actions/wrapper-validation@v4
        with:
          allow-checksums: a5e75118d96b4eac2100876f6af6a5ca5029cd440f87736425350fb4cf308b42,b3a875ddc1f044746e1b1a55f645584505f4a10438c1afea9f15e92a7c42ec13

      - name: Set up JDK 21
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '21'
          cache: 'gradle'

      - name: Restore google-services.json
        run: |
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON }}" ]; then
            echo "Decoding google-services.json from base64 secret..."
            echo "${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON }}" | base64 --decode > app/google-services.json
          elif [ -n "${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_PLAIN }}" ]; then
            echo "Writing google-services.json from plain text secret..."
            echo "${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_PLAIN }}" > app/google-services.json
          else
            echo "GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON secret not found. Using WARN strategy as configured in build.gradle.kts."
          fi

      - name: Setup Environment File
        run: |
          if [ -f .env.example ]; then
            cp .env.example .env
            if [ -n "${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}" ]; then
              echo "Injecting real GEMINI_API_KEY into .env..."
              sed -i 's/GEMINI_API_KEY=.*/GEMINI_API_KEY=${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}/g' .env
            fi
          fi

      - name: Decode Debug Keystore
        run: |
          if [ -f debug.keystore.base64 ]; then
            echo "Decoding debug.keystore.base64..."
            base64 -d debug.keystore.base64 > debug.keystore || base64 --decode debug.keystore.base64 > debug.keystore
          fi
          
          if [ ! -f debug.keystore ]; then
            echo "debug.keystore not found. Generating a fresh one..."
            keytool -genkey -v -keystore debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname "CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US"
          else
            echo "debug.keystore successfully loaded."
          fi

      - name: Make Gradle executable
        run: |
          sed -i 's/\r$//' gradlew
          chmod +x gradlew

      - name: Build Debug APK
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon

      - name: Upload Debug APK Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-debug-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
